title: stachys tetragona
intro: Stachys tetragona, also known as wormwood Betony or Hedge nettle, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, with a distinctive nettle-like appearance. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stachys tetragona include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
